text: I am doing the appendectomy with the help of Varis needle that is the Varis assisted two port appendectomy from last three months and Alhamdulillah up till now I have done
almost twenty such procedures and with every procedure and the passage of time I am further refining this procedure.
The surgeon uses a two-millimeter knot pusher to ligate the base of the appendix with a thread loop passed through the Varis needle.
Let me show you this two millimeter

knot pusher and I also have refined my loop passer with the help of which I take the loop through the various needle and I will also show you that loop passer this is the modified version of my loop passer and it is made out of steel previously I was using the quilting needle but that had the problem of getting rust after staying in water but it is not the problem with this loop passer
The surgeon displays a two-millimeter knot pusher, similar in design to the Windarker five-millimeter knot pusher, featuring a hole at its tip and side to accommodate 2-0 and 1-0 Vicryl thread.

The surgeon introduces the loop pusher through the varus needle, feeding an adequate length of thread. An intra-abdominal instrument grasps the appendix, holding it securely as the thread loop is positioned around its base.
The surgeon addresses the meso-appendix, freeing the base of the appendix. The same thread loop is then used to tie a knot at the base of the appendix after removing the varus needle.
The surgeon uses a knot pusher to pull the knot inside the abdominal cavity, threading it through the tip of the knot pusher as conventionally done with a five mm knot pusher.

The surgeon guides the knot pusher over the thread, ensuring it enters the abdominal cavity without hindrance. The loop is then tightened over the base of the appendix using an instrument already positioned within the intraperitoneal cavity.

and then remove the knot pusher so the additional benefit is you introduce the knot pusher through the same two millimeter hole through which the various needle was introduced and also it is time saving so what if you don't have time or don't know the channel how to get this knot pusher then there is another simple and easy way

simply take the stylet of already present various needle and buy a zero point seven mm drill bit and get a hole at its tip with the help of a lathe man lathe man is kharadia in our market so this is all what we need to do

The surgeon feeds the end of the thread to the tip of the stylet, grabs it through the side hole, and pushes it through the same 2mm incision into the abdominal cavity. The loop is then tightened over the base of the appendix.

I will upload a detailed separate video on different ways to perform the appendix me but here briefly I will tell you that how to cut the base and thread if you are using the ligature you can simply use it to cut the appendix and after that cut the thread with same ligature

The surgeon uses scissors to cut the appendix, followed by cutting the thread, ensuring support from the thread during the process. The thread is pulled out and cut with scissors outside the abdominal cavity.
